name: commit-check: 缺少 Co-Authored-By → 警告

tool_input.command: git commit -m 'fix bug'

name: commit-check: 包含 Co-Authored-By → 无警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-6) code'

name: commit-check: 非 commit 命令 → 透传

tool_input.command: npm test

name: commit-check: Co-Authored-By 带 email 后缀 (系统默认错误格式) → 格式警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>'

name: commit-check: Co-Authored-By 工具名错误 (产品名不是工具名) → 格式警告

git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (claude-opus-4-6)'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code'

name: commit-check: Codex CLI 合法格式 → 不警告

name: commit-check: 多行 Co-Authored-By (Claude + Codex 协作) 都合法 → 不警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'fix bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-6) code

name: commit-check: opt-in 负例 — 默认 fallback 到 generic + presets 已 vendor + 违规 subject → 不应 subject warn (back-compat)

tool_input.command:
git commit -m '随便写啥都行

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code'

name: commit-check: opt-in 正例 — HARNESS_PRESET=generic 显式 + 违规 subject → 仍 subject warn

tool_input.command:
git commit -m '随便写啥都行

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code'

name: commit-check: HARNESS_PRESET=example-company + 缺 TICKET 前缀 → subject warn

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'feat: add login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code'

name: commit-check: HARNESS_PRESET=example-company + 合规 'JIRA-1234 feat:' → 不警告

tool_input.command:
git commit -m 'JIRA-1234 feat: add login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code'

git commit -m 'fix bug

git commit -m 'fix bug

name: commit-check: 多 -m 形式（subject + body+coauthor 分两段）→ 不误报缺 Co-Authored-By (VH-18 F2)

tool_input.command:
git commit -m "feat(x): add y" -m "some body

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code"

name: commit-check: 多 -m 形式但 Co-Authored-By 格式错（缺第 3 段）→ 仍能 catch 格式问题 (VH-18 F2)

tool_input.command:
git commit -m "feat(x): add y" -m "body

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7)"

name: commit-check: 三段 -m (subject + body + trailer) 全拼接后校验通过 (VH-18 F2)

tool_input.command: git commit -m "feat(x): add y" -m "body explain" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code"

name: commit-check: 混用单/双引号 -m → subject 顺序正确 (VH-18 R2-2 保序)

tool_input.command: git commit -m 'feat: add x' -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code"

name: commit-check: 混用 -m 与 --message= → 保留出现顺序 (VH-18 R2-2)

tool_input.command: git commit -m 'feat: add y' --message='body' --message="Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-7) code"
